chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No.41 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case (Priority) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.146/2024 3. For hearing of Main Case 4. For hearing of CMA No. 147/2024 26.02.2026 Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Muhammad Rafiq Kamboh Advocate for the Respondent Learned counsel for the Respondent states that it may be just and proper and in the interest of revenue to set aside the impugned judgment and remand the matter to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably, within 90 days. He further seeks that pending the foregoing no coercive action arising here from be taken against the respondent. Learned counsel for the applicant articulates no cavil to the reference application being disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad PS
